inline_comments.message:
It would be better to use the spring-boot-25-starter-parent from ccsdk (added in another pending review) ... like so:
    <parent>
        <groupId>org.onap.ccsdk.parent</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-25-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>2.2.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>
